title: The AI assistant is back in the sidebar
summary: The AI chat surface had lost its place in the left nav, and questions typed into the floating Assistant went nowhere. Both are fixed: AI is a section again, and the Assistant hands your question straight to it.
highlights: Click AI in the sidebar to open the full assistant, with your own model or API key
Typing into the floating Assistant now opens the AI surface with your question carried over, instead of clearing it
